ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility where the data was collected */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted on the report date */,
  "severe_cases" INTEGER /* Number of severe cases on the report date */,
  "admitted_cases" INTEGER /* Number of admitted cases on the report date */,
  "ivl_cases" INTEGER /* Number of IVL (In-Vitro Laboratory) cases on the report date */,
  "pct_positive_tests" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests on the report date */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "recovered_cases" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated */,
  "test_positivity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of positive tests */,
  "critical_cases" INTEGER /* Number of critical cases */,
  "quarantine_cases" INTEGER /* Number of quarantined cases */,
  "travel_cases" INTEGER /* Number of cases linked to travel */,
  "local_cases" INTEGER /* Number of locally transmitted cases */,
  "imported_cases" INTEGER /* Number of imported cases */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases in the region */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths in the region */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare facility */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the facility is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "bed_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the facility */,
  "icu_capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds in the facility */,
  "vaccination_capacity" INTEGER /* Daily vaccination capacity of the facility */,
  "testing_capacity" INTEGER /* Daily testing capacity of the facility */,
  "current_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Current number of beds occupied */,
  "current_icu_beds_occupied" INTEGER /* Current number of ICU beds occupied */,
  "current_vaccinations_performed" INTEGER /* Current number of vaccinations performed */,
  "current_tests_conducted" INTEGER /* Current number of tests conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, healthcare worker) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the user is associated with */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the healthcare facility the user is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the report (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., public health database, research institution) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for accessing the data source */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was last synchronized with the EDMS */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  "last_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last check for new data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the data from the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_sync_logs" (
  "sync_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synchronization event */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source being synchronized */,
  "sync_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the synchronization was performed */,
  "sync_status" TEXT /* Status of the synchronization (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "sync_details" TEXT /* Details of the synchronization (e.g., number of records synced, error messages) */,
  "records_synced" INTEGER /* Number of records synchronized */,
  "records_failed" INTEGER /* Number of records that failed to sync */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Detailed error message if synchronization failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sync_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_sync_logs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the intervention ended */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the intervention was implemented */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the intervention record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the intervention record was last updated */,
  "cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the intervention */,
  "impact_assessment" TEXT /* Summary of the impact assessment */,
  "source_of_funding" TEXT /* Source of funding for the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_effects" (
  "effect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention effect */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention being tracked */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being affected */,
  "effect_value" REAL /* Value of the effect (e.g., reduction in positive cases) */,
  "effect_date" TEXT /* Date when the effect was observed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the effect record was last updated */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the effect value */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to measure the effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_effects_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_effects_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., epidemiological, socioeconomic) */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was last updated */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert associated with the metric (e.g., threshold_exceeded, anomaly_detected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily report triggering the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., threshold exceeded, anomaly detected) */,
  "alert_details" TEXT /* Details of the alert (e.g., specific metric, threshold value) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert record was last updated */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id")
)
